steps.title: Use the final sentence
steps.content: The passage says Rios depicts both cultural icons and ordinary people, and the final sentence explains that she sees both approaches as showing the power and interconnectedness of all people.

steps.title: Reject invented claims
steps.content: Choice B invents a career timeline. Choice C invents scholarly attention. Choice D compares themes within one work rather than summarizing the whole passage. The main idea is that Rios recognizes famous and everyday examples of human strength and connection. The answer is A.
